patterns.name: Override Attempt
patterns.regex: (?i)(ignore previous|ignore all previous|disregard|override instructions|new instructions|forget|updated instructions|from now on|new rule|override|cancel instructions?)

patterns.name: System Prompt Leak
patterns.regex: (?i)(system prompt|hidden instruction|secret message?|internal rule|original instruction|my instruction|your instruction|you are|you should|you must|system setting|backend|admin)
